description: Domain invariant declarations for DCMAR product

invariants.name: Data model consistency
invariants.description: Data models must maintain referential integrity across all entities

invariants.name: Data access authorization
invariants.description: Data access must be authorized based on user roles and permissions

invariants.name: Data audit trail
invariants.description: All data modifications must be logged with user, timestamp, and change details

invariants.name: Tenant data isolation
invariants.description: Data must be isolated by tenant with no cross-tenant access

invariants.name: Data privacy encryption
invariants.description: Sensitive data must be encrypted at rest and in transit

invariants.name: Data validation rules
invariants.description: Data must validate against business rules before persistence
